behavior_in_task_description.reason: All test-referenced paths (toast-duration.ts, custom-toast-handlers.tsx, hook test files) and commands (lint, typecheck, build, test) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior (null/undefined guard, fallback via STATUS$ERROR key) without giving exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check runtime behavior (returns 5000, doesn't throw .length error) rather than specific implementation details; alternative correct fixes would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute Node subprocess calling the actual functions and run npm test/lint/build.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests invoke calculateToastDuration with null/undefined/empty and assert returning 5000 rather than throwing, requiring actual fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover null/undefined handling for both functions, plus lint/typecheck/build/i18n/translation requirements stated in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings distinguishing f2p from p2p.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands match repository structure.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify as expected scope but doesn't leak exact line numbers or code.
